mapper.select: SELECT vote_id, subject_id, opid, uid, target_id, property_area, choice, voted_at, signature_hash, vote_channel, valid_flag, invalid_reason, invalidated_at FROM t_vote_item WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} AND valid_flag = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_vote_item SET valid_flag = 0, invalid_reason = #{invalidReason}, invalidated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE vote_id = #{voteId} AND valid_flag = 1
